task_completion.description: Load the diabetes.csv dataset into Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis window showing the 'diabetes' dataset loaded, indicated by a READ command in the program editor/log or the record count (768) displayed in the interface.

task_completion.description: Set biologically implausible zero values in the Glucose column to Missing
task_completion.visual_evidence: Commands in the Epi Info Program Editor or Output window showing Glucose being recoded or assigned to missing (e.g., RECODE Glucose TO . IF Glucose = 0, or ASSIGN Glucose = .).

task_completion.description: Set biologically implausible zero values in the BMI column to Missing
task_completion.visual_evidence: Commands in the Epi Info Program Editor or Output window showing BMI being recoded or assigned to missing (e.g., RECODE BMI TO . IF BMI = 0, or ASSIGN BMI = .).

task_completion.description: Export the cleaned dataset to diabetes_clean.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A WRITE command in Epi Info exporting to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\diabetes_clean.csv', or a file explorer window showing the newly created 'diabetes_clean.csv' file in the target directory.

task_completion.description: Conduct ROC curve analysis for Glucose predicting Outcome
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info output window showing an ROC curve graph or statistical results for Glucose vs Outcome. The Area Under Curve (AUC) should be approximately 0.7881.

task_completion.description: Conduct ROC curve analysis for BMI predicting Outcome
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info output window showing an ROC curve graph or statistical results for BMI vs Outcome. The Area Under Curve (AUC) should be approximately 0.6876.

task_completion.description: Save the final analysis output to roc_results.html
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ROUTEOUT command in Epi Info directing output to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\roc_results.html', or a file explorer/browser window showing the 'roc_results.html' file containing the Epi Info analysis results.

integrity.description: The agent used Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis to perform the task, not a Python/R script or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis graphical user interface being used for data manipulation and analysis. Terminal windows running pandas/sklearn scripts are a violation.

integrity.description: The ROC analysis results and HTML output were generated by the software, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML output or analysis results should match the standard Epi Info 7 output format (fonts, tables, layout). It should not look like a manually created text file or a hardcoded HTML document.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the data cleaning steps before running the ROC analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The command log must show the RECODE/ASSIGN steps occurring before the ROC commands. The AUC values (0.7881 and 0.6876) reflect the cleaned data; uncleaned data would yield different AUCs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 768 records. There are exactly 5 records with Glucose=0 and 11 records with BMI=0 that must be set to missing. After cleaning, the expected ROC AUC for Glucose predicting Outcome is approximately 0.7881 (or 0.79). The expected ROC AUC for BMI predicting Outcome is approximately 0.6876 (or 0.69). The Outcome variable has values 0 (no diabetes) and 1 (diabetes).
